TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ryohen, title = Ryohen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ryohen} }

S.FORM: alang Ryohen ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Nango go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 178 buwan, 569 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 534 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 35 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 90%, Amis 1%, Truku 1%, Bunun 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ryohen hya' ga K'babaw. tay mkyahu' na Ryohen hya' ga Hagaparis. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Ryohen ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Nango go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 178 buwan, 569 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 534 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 35 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 90%, Amis 1%, Truku 1%, Bunun 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ryohen hya' ga K'babaw. tay mkyahu' na Ryohen hya' ga Hagaparis. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ rjoħen ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ɣiraŋ keŋ atu naŋo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%, βunun *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na rjoħen ħjaʔ ɣa kʔβaβaw. taj mkjaħuʔ na rjoħen ħjaʔ ɣa ħaɣaparis~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
